movie.actors: Eddie Murphy, Nick Nolte, Brion James, Kevin Tighe
movie.genre: Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller
movie.plot: Jack Cates once again enlists the aid of ex-con Reggie Hammond--this time, to take down The Iceman, a ruthless drug lord operating in the San Francisco bay area.
movie.title: Another 48 Hrs.
movie.writer: Roger Spottiswoode (characters), Walter Hill (characters), Larry Gross (characters), Steven E. de Souza (characters), Eddie Murphy (story), John Fasano (screenplay), Jeb Stuart (screenplay), Larry Gross (screenplay)
